---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is or what is failing to load.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Logged into the game
2. Typed the slash command '...'
3. Clicked on the button '...'
4. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots & Lua Errors**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem. 
If you received a UI error box, please copy and paste the EXACT Lua error text here:

**Environment Info:**
* AIContext Version: [e.g., 1.3.4]
* WoW Client: 3.3.5a (Wrath of the Lich King)
* Private Server Core/Name: [e.g., AzerothCore, EvolvedWOTLK]

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here. (e.g., "The bug only happens when I try to scan my Guild Bank," or "I am also running ElvUI and MSBT.")
